# Test wiki entry created from a promoted lesson

This wiki entry was derived from a promoted lesson captured during a test session.

## Observation

The lesson described a non-obvious pattern for handling X in Y context.

## Why it matters

Without capturing this as a wiki entry, future sessions would repeat the same discovery.

## How to apply

When encountering X, refer to this entry for the established approach.
